de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termfeature

Class ClosedExpressionTermFeature

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termfeature.BinaryTermFeature
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.termfeature.ClosedExpressionTermFeature
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TermFeature

    public class ClosedExpressionTermFeature
extends BinaryTermFeature
    return zero cost if given term does not contain any free variables.
